about.label: About
about.title: 20 years creating spaces that tell your family's story
about.description: Graduated in Architecture and Urban Planning from UFSC in 1999, I began my career at firms in Joinville and Florianopolis before founding my own studio in 2006. Over two decades, I have developed an approach that goes beyond aesthetics: each project is born from a deep conversation about how you live, how your family grows, and what makes a space truly feel like yours.
about.philosophy: My method is collaborative. You express your aspirations, and I combine them with technical expertise to create something uniquely yours. The result is timeless spaces that evolve with your life.

statement.text: Creating timeless spaces that evolve with the family

services.label: Services
services.title: How I can transform your space

interiores.name: Interior Design
interiores.description: Complete residential interior architecture project. From concept to execution, every detail is carefully designed to create a space that reflects your personality and your family's rhythm.

consultoria.name: Personalized Consultation
consultoria.description: Consultative session for guidance on layout, materials, lighting, and solutions that enhance your space. Ideal for those seeking professional direction before starting a renovation.

acompanhamento.name: Construction Supervision
acompanhamento.description: Technical supervision throughout the entire project execution, ensuring that every material, finish, and detail is implemented as planned, with no surprises.

project.name: Costa Azul
project.description: A dialogue between the sea and the interiors. The project combines noble materials such as MDF in Cacao tone and Calacata, with furniture by designers Ibanez Razzera and Ricardo Vidigal, creating a timeless environment that integrates living room, dining area, and kitchen with a view of the bay.
project.materials: MDF Beige and Cacao (Arauco) | Ultracompact Calacata
project.furniture: Marin Table | Laz Chairs | Costela Armchair

cau.name: CAU-SC
cau.description: Architecture and Urban Planning Council of Santa Catarina

healthy.description: Healthy building certification, focused on well-being and air quality

ufsc.name: UFSC

contti.name: Contti Design

cta_section.title: Let's talk about your space
cta_section.subtitle: Free consultation, no commitment. Tell me how you envision your home.
